reasoning: The control IA-5(12) pertains to biometric authentication performance, which is specific to identity management systems that handle biometric data. Kubernetes does not natively manage user authentication at this level, as it typically relies on external identity providers for authentication, such as OIDC, LDAP, or cloud IAM services. Kubernetes itself does not have built-in support for biometric authentication, making this control not directly applicable to Kubernetes security configurations.
title: Authenticator Management - Authenticator management | biometric authentication performance for biometric-ba
